title: Fast & accurate retrieval — hybrid match, Bayes, gates
description: Product-scoped hybrid retrieval, INDICATES likelihoods, naive Bayes, escalate when sparse.
story: Speed without scope is a full-graph scan. Accuracy without gates is a confident wrong answer. We pin the product, match language softly, walk typed edges, multiply likelihoods, and escalate when the posterior is mush.
one_liner: Scope → hybrid match → typed Cypher → Bayes → escalate if weak.

beats.title: Retrieval + Bayes ranking
beats.narrative: miss_likelihood is the sparse-data soft landing — not inventing edges with KGE.

annotations.note: Missing edge uses miss likelihood instead of zeroing wrongly.

line_quiz.answer: Protect accuracy when evidence is thin
choices: Protect accuracy when evidence is thin

fill_blanks.template:
score *= likelihoods.get((s, fm), {{m1}})
# normalize so posteriors sum to 1

self_quiz.a: We soft-score + escalate + grow ABox; no silent edge invention in v1.

final_boss: Trace 'washer won't drain E21' through the pipeline aloud.
